indicators.name: large kitchen island
indicators.rationale: The kitchen island is too large and obstructive for a comfortable workspace.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no chair or stool designed for ergonomic support and comfort during extended computer use.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: There is no direct task lighting available to illuminate the workspace.

indicators.name: no dedicated layout
indicators.rationale: The space is not set up for focused work, as it appears to be a living area rather than a dedicated workspace.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large kitchen island and lack of flat personal work surface make it difficult to set up a comfortable and functional workspace. There is no ergonomic seating, task lighting, or dedicated layout to support extended computer use.
